name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Orlando, FL's Cash America Pawn at 6325 N Orange Blossom Trail offers quick pawn loans and buy-sell-trade services to Central Florida residents.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn is located at 6325 N Orange Blossom Trail #101 in Orlando, FL, standing as a convenient pawn shop for residents and visitors throughout Central Florida. The store operates Monday through Saturday from 9 AM to 6 PM and Sunday from 12 PM to 5 PM, making it accessible for both weekday and weekend transactions in the heart of Orlando's commercial corridor.

At this Orlando location, Cash America Pawn provides a range of pawn and trading services, including short-term pawn loans, buying, selling, and trading of items like jewelry, electronics, tools, and musical instruments. Customers can contact the store directly at +1 407-521-4956 to inquire about current offers, item valuations, or loan terms available at this specific Orlando branch.

If you need quick cash or want to sell or trade items in Orlando, this Cash America Pawn location on North Orange Blossom Trail is readily accessible with convenient hours. Bring a valid government-issued ID and the items you're pawning, selling, or trading. The staff can provide immediate valuations and help you understand the terms on the spot.
address: 6325 N Orange Blossom Trl #101, Orlando, FL 32810

company_info.headquarters: 6325 N Orange Blossom Trl #101, Orlando, FL 32810

pros: No credit check required—accessible to credit-constrained consumers
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability if unable to repay
Immediate cash on the spot—no lengthy application or funding delays
3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America for convenience
Wide variety of merchandise bought and sold beyond lending
10% layaway option allows purchase without full upfront payment
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) providing institutional stability
cons: Pawn loans carry significantly higher interest rates than personal or payday loans
Loss of pledged item if loan cannot be repaid—no option to keep the asset while managing debt
Short repayment terms typical of pawn loans may be insufficient for long-term cash needs
Requires physical collateral of sufficient value—not suitable for those without tangible assets
Limited to specific merchandise categories—not all items of value are accepted
best_for: Consumers with immediate short-term cash needs (under 90 days) and tangible assets
Credit-constrained individuals unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
People seeking to liquidate jewelry, electronics, tools, or other valuables for quick cash
Buyers looking for discounted merchandise or affordable layaway purchases
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for consumers facing immediate cash shortages who own tangible assets and lack access to traditional credit. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are asset-based, short-term financing with high interest rates—they are not a substitute for personal loans and result in loss of the pledged item if the loan cannot be repaid.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Gold and precious metal buying services
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, and musical instruments
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own payment solutions through AFF subsidiary (15,000+ merchant partners)
Retail finance payment solutions for consumer goods and services
Buy and sell services for general merchandise
Same-day cash payment upon pawn loan approval
meta_description: In Orlando, FL, Cash America Pawn at 6325 N Orange Blossom Trail offers quick pawn loans and trading.
